CVE-2021-27815.title: NULL Pointer Deference in the exif command line tool, when printi ...
CVE-2021-27815.description: NULL Pointer Deference in the exif command line tool, when printing out XML formatted EXIF data, in exif v0.6.22 and earlier allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) by uploading a malicious JPEG file, causing the application to crash.
